item.dc:creator: binkyningy

item.title: Why some people taste soap when eating coriander (cilantro)
item.description: Lieven Scheire, quite famous in Belgium. From his show 'DNA': https://youtu.be/HAbybR9BZBE?si=epMe1afrxgp9zhdY Additional info: https://flavourjournal.biomedcentral.com/articles/10.1186/2044-7248-1-22 (2012) "These results confirm that there is a genetic component to cilantro taste perception and suggest that cilantro dislike may stem from genetic variants in olfactory receptors. We propose that one of a cluster of olfactory receptor genes, perhaps OR6A2, may be the olfactory receptor that contributes to the detection of a soapy smell from cilantro in European populations." https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7206992/ (2020) "Scientists found most coriander haters to have a common olfactory receptor gene called OR6A2, which absorbs the odour of aldehyde chemicals (Eriksson et al., 2012). Flavour chemists discovered that coriander aroma is produced by about six substances, most of which are aldehydes. Those who do not like the taste are sensitive to harmful unsaturated aldehydes, while those not able to detect aromatic chemicals find it pleasant. To avoid the soapy taste, the coriander haters can often eat parsley instead of coriander."
item.dc:creator: isthatgrandma

item.title: IT WAS ALL LIES!
item.description: My cereal was NOT part of a balanced breakfast. I CANNOT do anything I set my mind to. Prices have NOT gone down due to advanced technology. Going to University did NOT guarantee me a job. I was NOT able to get into a good union. And worst of all...there are NO flying cars!
item.dc:creator: TheEndOfEvangelion

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i'm not actually a lizard, just like the pic
a regular childhood occurrence
i feel like it would be weird
there goes my business venture
this book was severely disappointing
sorry gang
that bed must feel so horrible
??
they should be in more horror movies
seriously it looks amazing
you'd be an idiot to not buy this
is there some other meaning for bdsm?
wait what
since there was a parrot earlier in the dump, yes.. i did
dang
no one cares
especially you, barry
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: AccidentalSharting

item.title: Deviousness Day 128
item.description:
Welcome to another Deviousness week! I am working on a bunch this week for the deviousness server and will be making a server announcement with the changes aiming for friday yay! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! Right now we have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2 friday nights. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. They will also be running a fun new area soon with a monthly photo contest voted on by the community where the winner will receive a custom digital artwork of their photo the following week by Cammyjay! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness I was asked to help promote a fellow imgurian's twitch stream and cat surgery fundraiser @ElbowDeepInPackages Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel last update: https://imgur.com/a/f4HcNvV The consult appointment was on July 9th, at that alone costed $180. She's up to $504 as of Sunday night, but that still leaves her far short of the expected costs. There will be additional costs for the procedure itself: Ko-FI: https://ko-fi.com/erosrogziel As a fellow imgurian who has asked for help when my own kitty was distressed I hope the community can halps them too!
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/gallery/fFYOR2B

item.title: Fontana Luminosa ("luminous fountain")
item.description: In the Italian town of L'Aquila there is an unusual fountain. The sun's rays passing through this fountain give the impression that fiery lava is pouring out of it. I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Lovebug makes an amazing recovery thanks to the good folks at Tabukpaws
item.description:
Lovebug was found covered in feces and dirt. Bowels were clogged from eating bones, scraps, and trash.
With amazing care and love from Tabukpaws, Lovebug got a new lease in life and became playful and enjoying life being a cat.
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Mr. YouTube and the ©
item.description: This is a special issue. We've made it to draw attention to the problems faced by original content creators and the YouTube's "sensible" attitude to copyright. If you want to join the resistance, please like and share this comic or video so that more people can see it! Video: https://youtu.be/mxjDHnlzKhU?list=PLx19i-PMxuA3W7Z-GJQzuL6awosnLELQk
item.dc:creator: andante89

item.title: Anyway, wish me luck friends!!!!
item.description:
My reaction!!
Another reaction.
And another….
Also me.
Me to my niece: I started Menopause. My niece: What’s menopause? Me: It’s when your period starts to stop cause it stops eventually. Me niece’s reaction to hearing that it stops eventually:
Then I told her how not fun the process can be and that mine is hurting like a mofo and I need to see a specialist now cause my skin is cracking open and flared up. Her new reaction:
Send help!! Lol
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants
